title: Savory Silky Poppy Seeds Stir-fry
description: A Mediterranean-friendly savory dish featuring poppy seeds that can be prepared in a lazy Sunday afternoon.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of poppy seeds
ingredients.notes: soaked for at least an hour

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Drain the soaked poppy seeds and rinse them with cold water.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add carrots and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until slightly softened.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice, scraping any browned bits on the bottom of the skillet. Let it reduce a little bit.
Stir in the poppy seeds, salt, and pepper. Cook for about 5 more minutes, tossing occasionally to prevent burning.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving plate or bowl. Serve hot as a side dish with grilled chicken or fish.
